x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Legal request volume determines the scale of benefit from Now Assist triage and routing capabilities. Higher request volumes mean greater time savings for legal operations teams using AI-assisted intake and classification.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){try{var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_ops_request");ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" requests",finding:c+" legal requests found."};if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" requests",finding:c+" legal requests found."};return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 requests",finding:"No legal requests found."};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure legal requests are being submitted through the Legal Service Delivery module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb7
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Legal request volume determines the scale of benefit from Now Assist triage and routing capabilities. Higher request volumes mean greater time savings for legal operations teams using AI-assisted intake and classification.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Legal Request Volume</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){try{var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_ops_request");ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" requests",finding:c+" legal requests found."};if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" requests",finding:c+" legal requests found."};return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 requests",finding:"No legal requests found."};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>LSD</module> <number>CHK0006217</number> <order/> <remediation_guidance>Ensure legal requests are being submitted through the Legal Service Delivery module.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb7</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
